## LibraryRuntime.ChocolateLibrary.getMold() method

Gets a [mold](./ts-chocolate.entities.molds.imold.md) by its [composite ID](./ts-chocolate.moldid.md)

**Signature:**

```typescript
getMold(id: MoldId): Result<IMold>;
```
